results.command: PORT=6545; LOG=artifacts/optimization/cod-pass50-profile-20260607T0030Z/candidate-runtime-info-1m-hf-server-$PORT-$$.log; target-cod-pass50-runtime-info-candidate/release/frankenredis --bind 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT >"$LOG" 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; sleep 0.25; target-cod-pass50-runtime-info-candidate/release/fr-bench --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --workload set --key-prefix pass50cand1m >/dev/null; kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true; true

PORT=6544; LOG=artifacts/optimization/cod-pass50-profile-20260607T0030Z/baseline-runtime-info-1m-hf-server-$PORT-$$.log; target-cod-pass50-current/release/frankenredis --bind 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT >"$LOG" 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; sleep 0.25; target-cod-pass50-current/release/fr-bench --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --clients 50 --requests 1000000 --pipeline 16 --keyspace 10000 --datasize 3 --workload set --key-prefix pass50base1m >/dev/null; kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true; wait $PID 2>/dev/null || true; true
